results.title: Introduce yourself - Forums
results.content:
Arshita Sharma•

4d ago

### New to Product Hunt.... Building CitedSpy and Excited to Learn

Hi everyone

I'm Arshita, founder of CitedSpy.

We are building a platform that helps brands understand and improve their visibility across AI search engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.

I've joined Product Hunt not just to launch a product, but to learn from founders, makers, marketers, and early adopters who are shaping the future of technology.

Salim Boudi•

2yr ago

### Pitch your product here, maybe someone is looking exactly for what you offer. [...] It started when I learned how much of trucking isn't driving: IFTA fuel taxes tracked by hand, receipts in shoeboxes, brokers who ghost on payment, quarterly filings built from sticky notes. So I've been building automatic per-state GPS mileage for IFTA, receipt + expense tracking, invoicing, FMCSA broker lookups before you book a load, route weather with air quality, and a live driver chat. It's free right now while in beta, and every feature so far came from a real driver complaint. Happy to swap notes with anyone building for blue-collar I think they're the most underserved users in software. What's everyone else working on?

Anna Ludwinowski•

1mo ago

### Hi PH people!!

Ok, I've lurked here long enough - time to say hi officially...

results.title: Chirpz Agent: Smartest way to discover unseen literature | Product Hunt
results.content:
⚡ AI Snapshots — skim papers in seconds.

📚 Cite with confidence — verified sources, accurate metadata, BibTeX, and PDFs.

Who it’s for

🎓 Academic labs — smarter literature search and pre-submission draft analysis.

🧑‍💻 Technology labs — explore new ideas and validate approaches with deep coverage.

🧪 Biotech & pharma teams — track discovery and clinical research in one place.

📖 Individual researchers — find relevant papers faster and manage citations easily.

🎓 Graduate students — build strong thesis foundations with guided discovery.

🚀 Try it out here:   
  
I’ll be here all day answering questions and collecting feedback.  
What kind of literature are you trying to discover — and what’s slowing you down today?

Thanks for checking it out 🙏  
— Sina

Syed Mustassim [...] Thanks for checking it out 🙏  
— Sina

Syed Mustassim

Congrats on the launch! Wondering if Chirpz is optimised equally for all research fields or optimised better for certain domains?

Sina Tayebati
PandaProbe

PandaProbe

@mustassim Great question! Chirpz is designed to work equally well across research fields.  
It searches across a broad mix of journals and databases and reads each paper in context, so results are ranked by true relevance to your work — not by domain or source.

Abdul Rehman
Triforce Todos

Triforce Todos

I’ve seen something like this recently, but can’t remember exactly which tool :D Does Chirpz suggest ways to optimize time while searching for papers?

Sina Tayebati

Been using Chirpz for a few weeks and it's honestly saved me so much time. Highly recommended.

Tabstack Browser Automation

What do you think? …

Sina Tayebati
PandaProbe

PandaProbe

👋 Hey Product Hunt!

I’m Sina, founder of Chirpz. I built Chirpz Agent because traditional keyword search isn’t smart enough to surface the papers that actually matter.

You have the idea. The literature exists. But guessing keywords across Scholar, arXiv, and journals still makes you miss what you need — or what reviewers expect you to know.

results.title: Spiral: The AI writing partner with taste | Product Hunt
results.content:
The research integration is killer. Fed it a blog post halfway through and it immediately understood how to incorporate that angle. This is what AI writing tools should be: actually collaborative, not just prompt-and-pray.

#### What needs improvement

Citations were functional but basic, just links at the end. Would love options for different citation styles (inline hyperlinks, footnotes, academic format, etc.) depending on where I'm publishing.

#### vs Alternatives

I choose spiral over other AI based writing tools because it forces you to think and it is not just generation of AI slop.

Ratings

Ease of use

Value for money

#### What's great [...] #### vs Alternatives

I chose Spiral because it's the first AI writing tool that truly captures my authentic voice without requiring repetitive prompt engineering. Unlike competitors that produce generic content, Spiral's Business DNA approach understands context and creates personalized outputs at scale. The collaborative interview format builds trust and understanding, making me feel like I have a real writing partner rather than just another AI tool. The combination of quality, ease of use, and time-saving capabilities makes Spiral the clear choice.

Report

#### What's great

Turned 'I want to write about Jevons Paradox and AI jobs' into a researched, cited, 700-word article with multiple drafts, revisions, and social posts, all in one conversation.

results.title: SciMaster Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
5.0

Based on 22 reviews

Review SciMaster?

Reviewers consistently say SciMaster saves substantial time on literature search, note-taking, and report drafting by producing structured research outputs with cited sources they find more trustworthy than generic AI tools. Users especially value its help with summarizing papers, explaining hard concepts, exploring unfamiliar fields, and breaking complex work into clear steps. Several also praise features like report export, customizable knowledge bases, and interactive workflow control. The few drawbacks mentioned are practical rather than fundamental: usage limits, a desire for better beginner tutorials, and missing attachment support.

Report

•1 review

SciMaster has completely revolutionized my research workflow. This AI agent actually doesthe tedious parts for me—from summarizing complex papers to drafting methodology. I used to struggle with other workflows, like using generic AIs to search for literature, only to end up with fabricated citations and superficial results that wasted hours of my time. Now, I simply delegate a task to SciMaster, go grab a coffee, and come back to find a well-structured research report waiting for me. It's a total game-changer.

#### What's great [...] I recently had the opportunity to use SciMaster, and I am thoroughly impressed. As a general‑purpose scientific AI agent developed by Shanghai Jiao Tong University and its collaborators, SciMaster delivers expert‑level in‑depth research capabilities—generating comprehensive, reliable research reports with citations, utilizing web search and 170 million academic documents for support ￼. Its ‘thought‑chain editor’ feature allows real-time user intervention to adjust logic and optimize the workflow—essentially partnering with the AI during research ￼. What’s more, its seamless integration with scientific tools—from molecular dynamics simulations to lab equipment via Uni‑Lab’s MCP services—enables a truly closed‑loop wet‑dry experimental ecosystem, boosting R&D efficiency significantly ￼.
